title: Connect Gmail to Claude  | Let AI Manage Your Emails Automatically
summary: The video demonstrates how to connect Gmail with Claude using the Gmail Connector, enabling Claude to securely access emails, summarize unread messages, and draft replies automatically. It covers connection setup, permission management, and practical usage patterns for email automation.
